display.purpose: App title and highest-emphasis text in the header.

body.purpose: Most UI text — descriptions, photo names, panel labels.

label.purpose: Form labels, switch labels, select items.

shadows.name: shadow-xs
shadows.purpose: Inputs, select triggers, subtle surface separation.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Cards — gentle lift off the page.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus, popovers — highest floating elements.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions — hover, focus, toggle.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Used for the print button and main actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #ce7e4f; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c46e3e; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #c9644280; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #b86030; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: transparent; color: #3d3929; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: 1px solid #dad9d4; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #e9e6dc; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #c9644280; } .ds-btn-outline:active { background: #ded8c4; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field for photo dimensions, margins, and numeric values.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 2.25rem; width: 100%; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; background: #faf9f5; color: #3d3929; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; border: 1px solid #b4b2a7; border-radius: 0.5rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #83827d; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #c96442; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #c9644280; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container for panels (photos, preview, settings).
components.html:
Panel Title
Supporting description
Panel content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #faf9f5; color: #141413; border: 1px solid #dad9d4; border-radius: 0.75rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.10), 0 1px 2px -1px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.10); } .ds-card-header { padding: 1.5rem 1.5rem 0 1.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; color: #141413; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #83827d; margin-top: 0.25rem; } .ds-card-body { padding: 1rem 1.5rem 1.5rem 1.5rem; }

components.name: Select Trigger
components.description: Dropdown trigger for paper size, layout, and language selection.
components.html: Option
components.css: .ds-select-trigger { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; background: transparent; color: #3d3929; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1; border: 1px solid #b4b2a7; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-select-trigger:focus { border-color: #c96442; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #c9644280; } .ds-select-chevron { color: #83827d; flex-shrink: 0; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggle control for booleans — show guides, include photo.
components.css: .ds-switch { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; width: 2rem; height: 1.15rem; padding: 0; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; outline: none; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-switch-on { background: #ce7e4f; } .ds-switch-off { background: #b4b2a7; } .ds-switch:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #c9644280; } .ds-switch-thumb { display: block; width: 1rem; height: 1rem; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 9999px; transition: transform 0.15s ease; transform: translateX(calc(100% - 2px)); } .ds-switch-off .ds-switch-thumb { transform: translateX(0); }

components.name: Tab (Default Variant)
components.css: .ds-tabs-list { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px; background: #ede9de; border-radius: 0.5rem; gap: 0; } .ds-tab { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: calc(100% - 2px); padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #3d3929; opacity: 0.6; background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.375rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; outline: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tab:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #c9644280; } .ds-tab-active { opacity: 1; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.10), 0 1px 2px -1px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.10); }

narrative.overview:
A clean, well-organized workbench for print layout. The interface feels like a physical countertop where precision tools are laid out within easy reach — accurate enough for a print-shop operator, approachable enough for someone printing family photos.

The system uses a warm clay-and-paper palette: a terracotta primary against creamy off-whites and warm stone neutrals. Inter provides a clean, legible single-family typography throughout. Surfaces are layered softly — subtle shadows separate panels from the page without simulating a floating card aesthetic. Components feel tactile and confident: buttons have clear hover states, inputs have defined focus rings, and every control responds deliberately.
keyCharacteristics: Warm but not 'cozy' — precision is the primary signal, warmth is the secondary comfort
Clay-and-paper palette: terracotta accent, warm off-white body, stone neutrals
Border-forward: containers use hairline borders and soft shadows to establish hierarchy
Single sans-serif family (Inter) keeps the tool calm and legible
Dark mode inverts to cool deep grays with a slightly lighter terracotta primary

rules.name: The Paper-Not-Cream Rule
rules.body: The body background is a warm off-white reading as uncoated paper stock, not painted cream or beige. The warmth is carried by the clay primary, not by a tinted background.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: One family, one voice. Inter serves all roles — no display font, no serif pairing.

rules.name: The Layered-Not-Lifted Rule
rules.body: No dramatic shadows, no floating card effect. Tonal layering does the structural work; shadows are a secondary cue.

dos: Do use the clay primary sparingly — it's the single accent. Applying it to >10% of a screen surface dilutes its impact.
Do use border-radius consistently (8px for controls, 12px for containers).
Do use the Paper-Not-Cream Rule: the body background reads as uncoated paper, not painted beige.
Do keep destructive actions in near-black, not red. Red is reserved for error messages and validation.
donts: Don't use the generic SaaS dashboard look — no sidebar-heavy layouts, no striped headers, no data-table chrome.
Don't pair Inter with another geometric sans-serif. One family is the rule.
Don't use border-left/right thicker than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use shadows larger than shadow-md (4px blur) on cards.
Don't use rounded corners larger than 12px on containers or 8px on controls.
